{{CargoClone
|name=Saintess of Abundance
|rank=orange
|cabin=2
|id=186
|gene1={race} DEF +50
|gene2={race} CIV +50
|gene3=Quantum Amp production +3%
|gene4=Per 60 Angel Minions in battle,
Troop Earth DMG +6
|gene5=Angel Minion Skin DEF +30%
|gene6=Per 60 Angel Minions in battle,
Troop Earth DMG +10
|gene7=Angel Minion Skin DEF +50%
|}}
